title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Porter - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Porter - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Porter invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Vadodara location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Porter:
Porter is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in A/B Testing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Porter!
